data.name: Aadhaar_Must_Be_12_Numbers
data.value: Aadhaar must be 12 numbers.

data.name: Age_must_be_18_to_join
data.value: Age must be 18 to join.

data.name: Both_Account_Numbers_Need_To_Be_Same
data.value: Both account numbers need to be same!

data.name: Centum_Club_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Centum club must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Date_of_birth_should_be_less_than_current_date
data.value: The date of birth should be less than the current date.

data.name: Date_Of_Joining_Should_Be_Greater_Than_Date_Of_Birth
data.value: The date of joining should be greater than the date of birth.

data.name: Date_of_joining_should_be_less_than_current_date
data.value: The date of joining should be less than the current date.

data.name: Date_Of_Last_Working_Should_Be_Greater_Than_Date_Of_Joining
data.value: The date of last working day should be greater than the date of joining.

data.name: Double_Pay_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Double pay must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Employee_No_Is_Required
data.value: Employee No is required.

data.name: External_Quality_Feedback_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: External quality feedback must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Fax_Files_And_Arrears_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Fax files and arrears must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: First_Minute_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: First minute incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Internal_Quality_Feedback_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Internal quality feedback must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Last_Working_Date_Is_Required
data.value: Last working date is required

data.name: Late_Coming_Deduction_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Late coming deduction must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Loan_deducation_date_should_be_greaterthan_or_equal_to_the_loan_release_date
data.value: The loan deduction date should be greater than or equal to the loan release date.

data.name: Marriage_anniversary_should_be_greater_than_date_of_birth
data.value: The marriage anniversary should be greater than the date of birth.

data.name: Monthly_amount_should_be_less_than_loan_Amount
data.value: The monthly amount should be less than the loan amount.

data.name: Night_Shift_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Night shift must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Other_Deduction_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Other deductions must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Other_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Other incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: PayMonth_Is_Required
data.value: PayMonth is required.

data.name: Production_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Production incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Punctuality_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Punctuality incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Spot_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Spot incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Sunday_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Sunday incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Transition_Team_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Transition team incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Unauthorized_Leave_Deduction_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Unauthorized leave deduction must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Weekly_Star_Incentives_Must_Be_Greater_Than_Or_Equal_To_0
data.value: Weekly star incentives must be greater than or equal to 0.

data.name: Year_of_Passing_Should_be_Less_than_Current_Date
data.value: Year of passing should be less than the current date.
